div1.entryFree:
Fester, 1) to rankle, to grow virulent: this --ed joint, R2 V, 3, 85. --ed members rot but by degree, H6A III, 1, 192. well might they (the wounds) f. 'gainst ingratitude, Cor. I, 9, 30.
2) to rot: lilies that f. Sonn. 94, 14. their poor bodies must lie and f. H5 IV, 3, 88. --ing in his shroud, Rom. IV, 3, 43.
